name: Bayer AG
lede: Bayer runs seventeen capability centers across twelve Indian cities. Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Medak, Deulgaon Raja, Udaipur, Toopran, Himatnagar, Karnal, Mumbai, Silvassa, Vapi and Thane, covering CoE, gbs, manufacturing, R&D, ssc and sales & marketing, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bayer office in India. We map seventeen, across twelve cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bayer AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bayer runs 17 verified GCC centers across 12 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Medak, Deulgaon Raja, Udaipur, Toopran, Himatnagar, Karnal, Mumbai, Silvassa, Vapi, Thane), covering CoE, gbs, manufacturing, R&D, ssc and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Bayer's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Medak, Deulgaon Raja, Udaipur, Toopran, Himatnagar, Karnal, Mumbai, Silvassa, Vapi and Thane, spanning CoE, gbs, manufacturing, R&D, ssc and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 73 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bayer operate in India?
faq.a: Bayer operates 17 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bayer have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Bayer's India GCC footprint spans Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Medak, Deulgaon Raja, Udaipur, Toopran, Himatnagar, Karnal, Mumbai, Silvassa, Vapi and Thane.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Bayer run in India?
faq.a: Bayer runs CoE, gbs, manufacturing, R&D, ssc and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bayer's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bayer's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bayer's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 73 leaders at Bayer's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
